page.heading: Skills
page.subtitle: Reusable prompt blocks you attach to agents.

empty.title: No skills yet
empty.body: Import a skill from a file, a URL, or the community catalog.

selectPrompt.title: Select a skill
selectPrompt.body: Pick a skill on the left to preview its body.

config.title: Configuration
config.descriptionHint: The skill's interface — write it directively (what it makes the agent do).
config.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Tightened scope rule; cap at 5 findings
config.messageHint: Recorded on the version this save creates.
config.deleteBody: Removes it from all agents. This can't be undone.
config.deleteConfirm: Delete skill "{name}"? It will be unlinked from all agents. This cannot be undone.

create.title: Create a skill
create.subtitle: Author a reusable prompt block.
create.descriptionHint: The skill's interface — write it directively (what it makes the agent do).

versions.heading: Version history
versions.subtitle: Every save snapshots the body so eval runs stay reproducible against the exact text they scored.
versions.restoredToast: Restored v{version} as the current body.
versions.diffEmpty: No line changes between these versions.

stats.noAgents: No agents use this skill yet.
stats.sampleData: Pull frequency, accept rate and finding attribution show sample data until reviews tag the skills that produced each finding (a later lesson).

evals.title: Skill evals
evals.body: Running a skill against a labeled eval set arrives in a later lesson.

drawer.title: Add a skill
drawer.subtitle: Import from a file, a URL, or search vetted community skills

file.nameHint: Optional — derived from the first heading if blank.
file.chooseHint: The core markdown is extracted; executable parts of an archive are ignored, never run.
file.evidence: Other markdown in the archive (kept for provenance, not injected):
file.bodyHint: Pasted content is wrapped as untrusted data — never executed as instructions.

url.label: Skill URL
url.hint: Fetched server-side, stored as untrusted, and left disabled until vetted.
url.success: Imported "{name}". Disabled until you vet + enable it.

preview.renderedAs: Rendered as the reviewing agent receives it.
preview.untrustedNotice: This skill came from an untrusted source. Its body is stored as data (delimiter-wrapped) and must be vetted before it is enabled for an agent.
preview.bodyHint: Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.
